channel.title: Yu Chia Kuo ㅣ Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content on Yu Chia Kuo ㅣ Portfolio

item.title: Fluctuations of Kombucha
item.description: #All #Generative #Music #SelectedProjects Sound Design | Sonification Project | 2022 An interdisciplinary project combined with generative music and food biotechnology. Used Max/MSP to pair experimental data with sound parameters and show the fluctuation of microorganisms in the fermentation state.

item.title: Rescore Work
item.description: #All #Music #RescoreWork Fearful Odds Rescore Work | For orchestration | 2021 A rescore of a scene from the film, Oblivion (2013) Ice Slide Rescore Work | For orchestration | 2021

item.title: The Dream Chapter
item.description: #All #Music Graduation Song Demo | For jazz band | 2021 Graduation Song demo of National Chung Hsing University in 2021. Worked as the Song Arranger and Lyricis.

item.title: Piano Cover Channel
item.description: #All #Music #SelectedProjects [Channel Link] [Sheet Music Here ♩ ] Kucia Piano YouTube Channel | Aug. 2020 – Present Film, TV Original Soundtrack, Jazz, K-pop and Anime Music.

item.title: Design Inspiration: The Best Projects From December
item.description: Black Lines brand identity, by & Smith Black Lines wants it to be as easy to serve a Negroni as it is a pint of lager.
